subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-11 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The responsibility of religion is one thing, while the responsibilities entailed by one's obligation to and membership in that office is another
subcodes.first_line_orig: وظیفهٴ دیانت دیگر است و وظیفهٴ ماموریّت و عضویّت دیگر البتّه باید وزیر یا سرباز بادآء
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @past, present and future of Iran
